creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you attach a new version to bug 218788? See comment 1 regarding consumers.

>  PORTREVISION?=	2 # keep for icu-lx

Reset it to 0.

> -lib/libicudata.so.%%ICUMAJOR%%
> +lib/libicudata.so.59

Don't blindly use "make makeplist". ICUMAJOR already expands to 59.
For now, avoid sorting pkg-plist as it complicates review.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 218788 ***
